title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur vs Larp Larp Larp Sahur
statement: The village of Sahur is under attack. The villagers have lined up n warriors in order of battle power (sorted ascending). Tung Tung Tung Sahur needs to find if a warrior with power level k exists in the lineup, but he can only bang his drum O(log n) times before Larp Larp Larp Sahur wakes up and ruins everything.
Find the 0-indexed position of the warrior with power k. If no such warrior exists, return -1.
You MUST solve this in O(log n). Linear scan = Larp Larp wins.
input_format: The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 10<sup>4</sup>), the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines. The first line contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n space-separated integers forming the sorted array.
output_format: For each test case, print a single integer: the 0-indexed position of k, or -1 if not found.
constraints: All elements unique. Array sorted ascending.
